name: Build Lyra v1.8 KERNEL
on:
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Java JDK 17
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Escribir archivos del proyecto
        run: |
          find . -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 ! -name '.github' -exec rm -rf {} +
          mkdir -p app/src/main/java/com/lyra/audiokernel
          mkdir -p app/src/main/res/layout
          mkdir -p app/src/main/res/drawable
          mkdir -p app/src/main/res/values
          echo YW5kcm9pZC51c2VBbmRyb2lkWD10cnVlCmFuZHJvaWQuZW5hYmxlSmV0aWZpZXI9dHJ1ZQ== | base64 -d > gradle.properties
          echo  | base64 -d > settings.gradle
          echo cGx1Z2lucyB7CiAgICBpZCAnY29tLmFuZHJvaWQuYXBwbGljYXRpb24nIHZlcnNpb24gJzguMy4yJyBhcHBseSBmYWxzZQp9 | base64 -d > build.gradle
          echo  | base64 -d > app/build.gradle
          echo  | base64 -d > app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml
          echo  | base64 -d > app/src/main/res/values/styles.xml
          echo  | base64 -d > app/src/main/res/drawable/nixie_bg.xml
          echo  | base64 -d > app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml
          echo  | base64 -d > app/src/main/res/layout/item_track.xml
          echo  | base64 -d > app/src/main/res/layout/item_playlist.xml
          echo  | base64 -d > app/src/main/java/com/lyra/audiokernel/VUMeterView.java
          echo  | base64 -d > app/src/main/java/com/lyra/audiokernel/TrackInfo.java
          echo  | base64 -d > app/src/main/java/com/lyra/audiokernel/TrackAdapter.java
          echo  | base64 -d > app/src/main/java/com/lyra/audiokernel/LyraPlaylist.java
          echo  | base64 -d > app/src/main/java/com/lyra/audiokernel/LyraPlaybackService.java
          echo  | base64 -d > app/src/main/java/com/lyra/audiokernel/MainActivity.java

      - name: Compilar APK
        run: |
          gradle wrapper --gradle-version 8.7
          chmod +x gradlew
          ./gradlew :app:assembleDebug --stacktrace

      - name: Entregar Lyra v1.8
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: Lyra-v1.8-KERNEL
          path: "app/build/outputs/apk/debug/*.apk"
